payload.answer: Weather observations are ephemeral and should not be committed to durable memory. This statement has no lasting relevance beyond the current day.

entity_resolution.reason: Weather observations lack durable value; temporal scope (today) is transient and will become stale

details: Reason: Ephemeral temporal scope and low informational durability
Recommendation: Use transient storage or provide context linking to durable facts

repair_options: Commit only if weather pattern is part of a larger context (e.g., planning, health impact)
Store as temporary cache with automatic expiration
Request clarification on why this weather observation matters for future recall
